title: About
name: Doug Fessler
headline: Senior Gameplay Engineer
bio: I'm a Senior Gameplay Engineer at Lightspeed LA, currently working on Last Sentinel. Most of my work lives between design and the engine: mission systems, in-game cinematics, save architecture, quest logic. The goal is always the same: give designers the tools to author and debug their own work without needing an engineer in the room.

I got into this through RPG Maker. Spent a lot of weekends trying to make it do things it wasn't designed for, eventually hit a ceiling, and decided to learn C++ to get past it. That led to FireForge, shipping Ghostbusters and a couple of prototypes, then Blizzard where I worked on Hearthstone for four years across eight expansions. I've been on teams of three and teams of fifty. Both have trade-offs.

stats.label: focus

highlights.title: Last Sentinel

highlights.title: Hearthstone
